title: deployment.artifact.ready
description: Outbound success event emitted by anvilkit-export-worker after the CAS transition to ARTIFACT_READY succeeds (CAS-then-emit, FR-013). Minimum schema per PRD 0010 §10.3.2. routes[] is intentionally omitted (BD-001 / ADR-001): cdn-service reads route data from artifact-manifest.json, where routes[] remains present and always an array (FR-012); routes[] may be added to this event later only as an additive optimization field. Emission is at-least-once — consumers must be duplicate-tolerant keyed by deploymentId. Additive evolution only — removing or renaming a field requires a schema version bump (FR-002).

deploymentId.description: Deployment record ID — consumer dedup key

version.description: Published version the artifact was rendered from

renderMode.description: Render mode used to produce the artifact

artifactBasePath.description: Storage base path of the artifact, confined to sites/{siteId}/deployments/{deploymentId} (FR-010)

manifestStorageKey.description: Storage key of artifact-manifest.json (internal-only object, never public — FR-012)

manifestDigest.description: SHA-256 digest of the manifest, sha256-<hex> form

entry.description: Entry HTML path within the artifact, e.g. /home/index.html

filesCount.description: Number of files in the artifact

traceId.description: Trace ID of the producing job (cross-boundary traceability, FR-020)

createdAt.description: Emit time, ISO 8601 — field name matches the inbound event vocabulary (PRD 0008 §8.1)
